name: Stir-Fried Szechuan Lobster with Chili Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the sauce by mixing together hoisin sauce, chili sauce, shao-hsing, soy sauce, fish sauce, chili paste with garlic, sugar, MSG (if desired), sesame oil, hot chili oil, and 1/2 teaspoon of peanut oil. Reserve the remaining 1/4 cup of peanut oil.
2. Heat a large, very hot wok over high heat until the oil is smoking. Salt the cut lobster pieces lightly and add them to the hot wok. Sear the cut surfaces until the lobster is just about cooked, about 3 to 4 minutes. Remove the lobster pieces and place them on a platter.
3. To the remaining oil in the wok, add ginger, scallions, garlic, and dried chilies. Stir-fry for 1 minute.
4. Add the reserved lobster pieces and toss to combine well with the sauce. Turn the mixture onto a serving platter and serve immediately.
